data.title: Capsule Security Exits Stealth With $7M to Stop AI Agents From Going Rogue at Runtime
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, Capsule Security has emerged from stealth with a $7 million seed funding round. The investment was spearheaded by Lama Partners and Forgepoint Capital International. Capsule Security specializes in safeguarding the most volatile element within the AI framework during runtime. Its technology aims to thwart any attempts to tamper with AI agents, prevent them from acting improperly, or covertly extracting data while processing critical information and workflows within a corporate environment. Additionally, Capsule is guided by prominent figures in the field of security.

data.title: DoorDash to pay delivery workers in stablecoins on Stripe's blockchain, Tempo, in over 40 countries.
data.description: DoorDash, a delivery company, has announced a partnership with Stripe's blockchain platform, Tempo, to provide payment solutions to its Dashers across over 40 countries. Dashers will receive their payments in stablecoins through this new system.

data.title: Janet Yellen Keeps Fed Cut Hopes Alive As Iran War Roils Markets— 'If I Had To Write One Thing Down...'
data.description: Janet Yellen, former U.S. Treasury Secretary, expressed the possibility of a Federal Reserve rate cut later this year amidst the ongoing Iran conflict. She mentioned this during the HSBC Global Investment Summit in Hong Kong, stating that despite rising inflation expectations due to the oil-driven shock, the Fed remains open to adjustments. Yellen highlighted the significant supply shock affecting various sectors such as gasoline, LNG, fertilizers, food, and shipping costs caused by the six-week Iran conflict. She suggested that there might be a rate cut later in the year, emphasizing the complex inflation outlook. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Horizon Quantum and AQT to Advance Real-World Quantum Applications with Strategic Hardware–Software Collaboration
data.description: Horizon Quantum Computing Pte. Ltd., a subsidiary of Horizon Quantum Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: HQ) and Alpine Quantum Technologies (AQT) of Innsbruck, Austria, have revealed a strategic partnership to enhance the progress of quantum computing applications. This collab aims to bolster the development of practical quantum computing solutions by boosting integration of software with hardware. AQT is a key European player in trapped-ion quantum computers. This cooperative effort between Horizon Quantum and AQT signifies a significant move towards fostering innovation in the quantum computing sector.

data.title: Ongwe Minerals Announces Listing on the Namibia Securities Exchange
data.description: Ongwe Minerals Inc. has successfully fulfilled all necessary conditions for a dual-listing on the Namibia Securities Exchange under the symbol "ONG". The company, listed as OGW on the TSX Venture Exchange and NSX as ONG, will commence trading on April 15, 2026. The TSX will continue to serve as the primary listing for Ongwe's common shares. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's visibility and accessibility in the market, providing investors with more opportunities to participate in its growth.

data.title: Alipay AI Pay Launches New Service Enabling OpenClaw-type AI Agents to Make Payments
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, Alipay has introduced a new payment service utilizing AI Pay technology, allowing OpenClaw-type AI agents known as "lobsters" to conduct purchases and payments upon receiving user commands. These autonomous AI tools operate on behalf of users without the need for coding or intricate configurations. The service is equipped with multi-layer security measures for each transaction, enhancing the efficiency and capability of AI agents with Alipay.

data.title: Azenta (AZTA) Stock Drops 13% After-Hours — What's Happening?
data.description: Azenta Inc's (NASDAQ: AZTA) stock is experiencing a decline in after-hours trading due to the recent submission of a Form 3 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Azenta Life Sciences, a company specializing in life sciences tools to expedite the development of therapies, disclosed the filing. William E. Martin III, the President of Multiomics at Azenta, submitted a beneficial ownership statement under Section 16(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 on April 16, 2026. The filing reveals that there are no beneficially owned securities. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CIBC Innovation Banking Serves as Lead Arranger for Vena Solutions’ Expanded Credit Facility and Syndicate to Support Acquisition of Acterys
data.description: In Toronto, CIBC Innovation Banking revealed their involvement as the Lead Arranger and Administrative Agent in extending a credit facility for Vena Solutions (Vena), a renowned AI-driven Microsoft-native Financial Planning and Analysis (FP&A) platform. Vena aids customers in enhancing their planning capabilities and reaching their goals by integrating data, individuals, and agents. The augmented financing and expanded syndicate will facilitate Vena's purchase of Acterys, a prominent Microsoft Power BI-dependent oper.

data.title: Annual shareholders' meeting on 26 May 2026 has been scheduled. Mark your calendars!
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that global carbon emissions have risen by 2.7% in 2018, reaching a record high of 37.1 billion tons. This increase can be attributed to a surge in energy use, particularly from the coal and oil sectors. The rise in emissions was the largest since 2010 and poses a significant challenge to meeting the goals set by the Paris Agreement. The report also highlighted that China, the US, and India were the top contributors to this increase, collectively accounting for nearly 70% of the rise in emissions. Experts warn that urgent action is needed to curb these escalating carbon emissions and combat climate change effectively.

data.title: Allianz Life Adds New Accumulation-Focused Fixed Index Annuities
data.description: Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America (Allianz Life) from Minneapolis has revealed its plans to provide additional accumulation-focused fixed index annuities (FIAs) to support Americans in achieving their retirement objectives. As a prominent figure in the industry, Allianz Life is introducing two new FIAs with exclusive features such as Index Lock1. One of these new products, Allianz Accumulation Advantage 5TM, enriches the existing accumulation-focused FIA line-up with a 5-year withdrawal option. This move aims to cater to the retirement needs of individuals, emphasizing the company's commitment to helping customers secure their financial future.

data.title: Roche’s ENSPRYNG (satralizumab) reduces risk of relapses by 68% demonstrating potential to become first treatment for MOGAD
data.description: Today in Basel, Roche revealed new data from the Phase III METEOROID study indicating that ENSPRYNG® (satralizumab) achieved a 68% reduction in the risk of a new relapse compared to placebo in adults and adolescents with myelin oligodendrocyte glycoprotein antibody-associated disease (MOGAD). The study met its primary endpoint, showing a significant decrease in the time to first MOGAD relapse during the double-blind treatment period (p=0.0025). These findings were presented during a late-breaking oral session at the 2026 American Academy of Neurology (AAN) Annual Meeting in Chicago. Roche is listed as RO and ROP on the SIX stock exchange and RHHBY on the OTCQX.
Revealed transactions on shares from 4/15 to 4/17, 2026, with significant numbers.
